overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a dirt path at night during a rainstorm. The journey progresses from open sheep pastures through a rural village with smoking chimneys and fire-lit wooden structures, then into a dark forested area.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural pasture with stone walls and grazing sheep

events.description: passes a peasant standing by the path on the left side

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path through grassy pastures with swords on his back, rain falling around him

notable_agents.action: peasant standing by the path, raising hand to forehead as Geralt passes

entered.detail: low stone wall running along the right side of the dirt path
group of white sheep grazing in the grassy field to the right of the path
dense evergreen forest forming the dark background horizon
narrow winding dirt trail through the grassy terrain

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt path through open grassland at night in the rain. A stone wall runs along the right side while sheep graze in the fields ahead. A peasant stands by the path on the left as the camera passes, and a village with smoking chimneys becomes visible in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: village outskirts with wooden huts and smoking chimneys

events.description: passing a wooden hut with firelight glowing from within on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path past village buildings, glancing toward the lit structures on the left

entered.detail: cluster of wooden village houses with thatched roofs visible ahead
chimneys emitting white smoke against the dark sky
small wooden structure with warm firelight glowing from the entrance
rustic wooden fencing along the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The path leads into a rural village outskirts at night. Wooden buildings with smoking chimneys appear ahead, and a fire-lit hut stands close on the left. The stone walls and sheep of the open pasture fall behind as the forest trees move to the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail leaving the village behind

agents.ego_description: walking deeper into the dark forest as the village lights fade behind, following the winding dirt trail

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees closing in on the left side of the path
large moss-covered rocks and boulders alongside the trail
massive tree trunk with gnarled bark close to the path edge

segments.scene_description: Leaving the village behind, the path enters a dense forest with tall pine trees closing in on both sides. The canopy blocks most of the sky, making the surroundings darker. Large rock formations appear along the trail as Geralt continues walking deeper into the woods.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an open, rainy pasture into a rural village and finally into a dark, oppressive forest. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path through grasslands where sheep graze beside a stone wall and a lone peasant stands by the road. As the camera moves forward, the open fields give way to the outskirts of a village, where the lighting shifts toward the warm glow of fire-lit huts and smoking chimneys. The scene then shifts away from the wooden structures as the path narrows, with the village fading behind and tall pine trees beginning to crowd the frame. Finally, the environment closes in completely as the camera enters a dense forest, where a thick canopy blocks the sky and large rock formations line the trail.
